meaning: No ADR tunnel restriction from the tunnel-code perspective. Category A tunnels are the least restrictive.
Passage forbidden through tunnel categories B, C, D and E.

Tank carriage: forbidden through B, C, D and E. Other carriage: forbidden through D and E.
conditional_meaning: Depends on tank vs other carriage.
